instruction: Click on the "Next" button.
Click button ONE, then click button TWO.
Select LnUv1Hm, KPaRPI, eYwYI, qA2CcW and click Submit.
Click on the link "hendrerit".
Select 2Sxb and click Submit.
Click on Tab #1.
Focus into the textbox.
Enter 06/13/2014 as the date and hit submit.
Enter "Dannie" into the text field and press Submit.
Enter the password "1GS" into both text fields and press submit.
Enter the username "donovan" and the password "nO2oi" into the text fields and press login.
Use the textbox to enter "Alan" and press "Search", then find and click the 4th search result.
Navigate through the file tree. Find and click on the folder or file named "Jerald".
Enter an item that starts with "Li" and ends with "ibya".
Select 05/16/2016 as the date and hit submit.
Close the dialog box by clicking the "x".

instruction: Click on a "text" widget.
